onboarding.slide1_desc: Write down your dreams right after waking up so you don't miss a single detail.
onboarding.slide2_desc: The algorithm helps find connections between symbols and emotions.
onboarding.slide3_desc: Return to past dreams and discover the meanings of symbols.
onboarding.slide4_desc: We care about privacy and data security.
onboarding.slide5_desc: Allow notifications to receive reminders to record dreams after waking up.
onboarding.slide5_hint: You can change this later in settings
